cms.task_text: Kód má kreslit [hlp]8 teček rovnoměrně po kružnici[/hlp], ale smyčka se opakuje jen 4×. Opravte počet.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_dot"><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">45</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
